ticket: I noticed I was billed twice for last month's subscription. Can you process a refund?
Is there a way to update the credit card on file before the next billing cycle?
Password reset links expire too quickly. By the time I check my email and click, it says expired.
Single sign-on is not working with our Okta tenant. We get a SAML response error after authenticating.
The HubSpot integration imports contacts but skips email addresses. It worked fine last week.
The Android app freezes when I try to attach a file from Google Drive. The screen locks up for ten seconds.
Our team's reporting dashboard takes over thirty seconds to load and sometimes never finishes.
How do I schedule a weekly export of our user activity logs? I need them for compliance reporting.
The bulk update endpoint returns 429 Too Many Requests when our integration sends parallel requests.
Can you confirm whether our account uses encryption at rest for stored documents? Our security team is asking.
I am setting up a new workspace and the invite emails to my team members are not arriving. I checked spam.
It would be helpful if the platform could send digest emails of weekly activity rather than individual notifications.
When I save a new contact, the phone number field strips the country code. The original input has a plus sign.
Just curious: does the platform have a public API for the new analytics module?
The user list export is missing the date_created column even though I selected it in the export options.
Could you add a feature to schedule recurring tasks with a custom cadence beyond daily and weekly?
Our SSO works for most users but three users in our finance team get a 401 every time. Their accounts are configured the same as everyone else's.
The mobile app shows duplicate notifications when I am also signed in on the web. Can these be deduplicated?
